[[File:Ego.svg|thumb]]
Ego entrapment is being trapped by your ego<ref>{{Cite web|last=Immanuelle|date=2022-07-14|title=The Nine Plagues and Ninefold Vaccine|url=https://evolution.faith/ninefold-vaccine/|access-date=2022-11-14|website=The Church of Evolution|language=en-US}}</ref>

It is one of the [[nine plagues]]

Your ego can often sabotage you because it is a defence mechanism which wants to avoid change, even positive change

As it is a [[New plagues|new plague]] it does not have a well defined booster shot against it yet, although the booster shot is linked to [[larping]] and [[gnosis]] and a subtype of the booster shot of [[enstuckment]].

[[Ego Death|ego death]] in particular seems to be the solution to it, although that’s the extreme form of [[ego weakening]]

Ego develops in high school due to people perceiving others as having sustained nuanced opinions of you<ref name=":0">https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ozu9Jd_Fm-I</ref>

People are biased to prove their self image, even negative things<ref name=":0" />

People want comfort, so when they get discomfort from changing they stop<ref name=":1">https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cHFD2ycNsBs</ref>

Going and doing things in nature may be a better [[booster shot]] than [[ego death]] due to being more accessible and less overkill<ref name=":0" /><ref name=":1" />

A big example is people in abusive relationships whether they follow a script that they are comfortable with which leads to constantly getting into a new abusive relationship

== References ==
[[Category:Entrapment]]
[[sn:Ego entrapment]][[Category:Ego entrapment]]
[[sn:Ego entrapment]][[Category:Nine Plagues]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Ego entrapment]]
[[Category:Pages]]
